title: Connected Boards - Connect Subitems to Subitems
excerpt:
Hi team, 
Is there any current development to connect subitems to subitems in the Connect-boards columns? 
If not, this feature would be helpful. 
Thanks,

posts.author: Jonatas (Jonatas Santos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,

Is there any current development to connect subitems to subitems in the Connect-boards columns?

If not, this feature would be helpful.

Thanks,

posts.author: aeriskoulou (Katia Zacharaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Seems that the connection of subtasks directly through the connect-boards feature does not work. That comes to a surprise to me, as it seems quite straight forward to be done, as the same feature for tasks exists. There are other options to summarise subtasks etc, but in my case I have multiples subtasks and want their columns to be mirrored.

Would be interesting to see if others have similar issues.

posts.author: ktlatus (Katie Villa)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to mirror a subitem on one board to a subitem on a second board, but it appears that only top level items can be mirrored. Please create a feature where subitems can be mirrored between boards!

posts.author: SamanthaWagner (Samantha Wagner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am also looking for a way to connect Subitems from board A to subitems from Board B.
I have two different use cases where this would be helpful.
For example, connecting SOPs to Job Responsibilities. Or connecting Training Content to a Training Program. Is anybody in the community aware of updates or creative work arounds to accomplish something like this?

Appreciate any feedback!

Thanks,
Sam

posts.author: pjvoysey (PJ Voysey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like to connect subitems (or items) to subitems. I had to restructure a whole board to be items instead of subitems so that I could connect to the items (vs the subitems).

Like someone else commented, I was surprised that connecting to subitems was not an option.

Thanks
PJ

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
There actually is a way to do it!

See my post here:

Connecting Subitems to Other Subitems – Secret Unlocked! Special workflows & use cases
Problem: Connecting Subitems to Subitems Disclaimer: This specific use case is for the subitems to connect with each other in the same board. However, it works the same on different boards as well. Just make sure to add it to the subitem level of the other board as well. Solution: Add connect-boards column on the subitem level. [Screenshot 2025-07-17 at 14.10.25] Choose the same board as the connection, making sure it is a 2-way connection. [Screenshot 2025-07-17 at 14.10.48] Refres…
